question: What two molecules are produced by the light-dependent reactions of photosynthesis?
Who was the first person to set foot on the Moon, and on what date did the landing occur?
Which paper introduced the Transformer architecture and in what year?
Compare the role of self-attention in Transformers to the role of chlorophyll in photosynthesis: what does each enable in its respective system?
references: Self-attention enables tokens to model dependencies across the sequence regardless of distance; chlorophyll captures light energy that powers the photosynthesis reactions.

question: Which scientist established that the restorative effect of plants on air required sunlight, and which US president set the goal of a manned Moon landing?
references: Jan Ingenhousz (1779) established the sunlight requirement; John F. Kennedy (1961) set the Moon landing goal.
